data.name: severity.info
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: ui-core severity label — informational tier.

data.name: severity.warning
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: ui-core severity label — warning; actionable but non-blocking.

data.name: severity.error
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: ui-core severity label — error; blocking failure.

data.name: severity.critical
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: ui-core severity label — critical; system-impacting failure.

data.name: action.save
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: ui-core in-flight save state. Present-progressive; trailing U+2026 ellipsis preserved.

data.name: action.cancel
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: ui-core action verb — dismiss/abort. Imperative.

data.name: action.retry
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: ui-core action verb — retry after failure. Imperative.

data.name: state.loading
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: ui-core empty-state placeholder while data loads. Trailing U+2026 ellipsis preserved.
